violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item was prepared in private home. Rice and beans in hot holding unit were made in the owner's home kitchen, not in the mobile unit. Only foods that are prepared in the truck, or obtained from an approved source, can be served.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Vacuum sealed food item was not labeled. Food items that are not easily identified should be labeled.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing. Vacuum sealed meat found in the under counter freezer. Processes for vacuum sealed foods must be approved from the Department of Health. Home canned food items, salsa, sold in mobile unit. Home canned food items must be tested before they are sold.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of microwave was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Equipment is not being washed in the food truck 3 compartment sinks. It is being taken to the owner's house. Equipment must be cleaned in an approved location. Three compartment sinks were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hot water is not available for the three compartment & handwashing sinks. Hot water must be available.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand washing sink found blocked by large pans. Sinks for washing hands should be available at all times.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
